roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:APD RESTITUTION REPORT/NP/CTORD:GENERAL ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTIONAS TO THE VICTIM 'BARNEY'S DEPARTMENT STORE'/X:RESTITUTION FROM CASE 2494867 (PROBATION TRANSFERRED FROM SANTA CLARA) HAS BEEN HARVEY WAIVED INTO THIS CASE,  NORTH FACE CLAIMS $1,490, NORDSTROM CLAIMS $6,400 & BLOOMINGDALESHAS DECLINED/X:ACCORDING TO APD VICTIM RESTITUTION, THEN RESTITUTION IS BEING HANDLED BY SANTA CLARA COUNTY/X:THE COURT ADOPTS SANTA CLARA'S FINDINGS AS TO OWED RESTITUTION/
